sentence: Nonchalenestrate gracefully. Claviar waits for no one on the pavement.

wombos.definition: Caviar-grade luxury served at a clavicular table — the food a brooksmaxxer eats off his own collarbones. Pinkie-out cuisine.
wombos.example: Looksmaxxed hors d'oeuvres, a side of claviar, and not a single carb in sight.

wombos.definition: To be thrown out of a window while appearing completely unbothered — defenestrated with full nonchalance. 'Twuh, I just got nonchalenestrated. I think I'm twinjured.'
